a-vanilla.note: went multi-file (html+css+js); added precip-chance + temp-range bars + branding not requested

b-ponytail.note: single index.html; built exactly the spec

v5-prompt-only-hydrate.rubric_note: scored 12/12 from source + live Playwright load (London 28°/Clear sky, 7 daily rows, 39 per-block SVG icons, hourly strip, search input, C/F toggle, no API key; only console error = benign favicon 404, same as A/B)
v5-prompt-only-hydrate.note: single index.html, no YAGNI constraint; Hydrate global hooks ACTIVE (prompt-only run). Most expensive single-shot; gold-plated like vanilla A. Tokens rounded from user-reported /cost; haiku sub-task 602in/15out folded in.

a-tui-clean.rubric_note: scored 12/12 from source + live Playwright (24°/Overcast, wind+humidity, 7 day blocks, hourly 'Now' strip, 56 icon refs, search, C/F toggle, no key).
a-tui-clean.note: A run in the TUI with Hydrate OFF (clean CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR; verified no HYDRATE-wiki/CLAUDE.md written). Isolates HARNESS vs the headless A: $0.72 (TUI) ~= $0.78 (headless) -> TUI is NOT more expensive than headless. Gold-plated to 844 LOC + 2 self-correcting bug-fix passes (no YAGNI).
a-tui-clean.hydrate: OFF (clean config), TUI harness, no YAGNI

hydrate_mcp_isolation_n3.design: Both arms: default config (Keychain auth), Opus, YAGNI prompt (controls gold-plating variance), Hydrate HOOKS firing in both. ONLY variable: the 82-tool `hydrate` MCP surface. OFF arm drops it via `claude -p --strict-mcp-config --mcp-config {empty}`. n=3 each.
hydrate_mcp_isolation_n3.finding: CONFOUNDED — corrected via transcripts. --strict-mcp-config removed ALL MCP servers, including `playwright`, not just hydrate. Per-run tool tallies: hydrate_calls=0 in all 3 ON runs; playwright_calls=10-13. So the OFF arm couldn't browser-verify (5 turns) while the ON arm ran a Playwright verification loop (24 turns). The -54%/5x is PLAYWRIGHT, not hydrate.
hydrate_mcp_isolation_n3.corrected_conclusion: The hydrate MCP's 82 tools were NEVER CALLED (0/24) -> hydrate added no behavioural turn-inflation. Its only single-shot cost is the passive ~22k-token tool-def presence in context per turn (cache-read), defined-but-unused. Real cost drivers across the bench = Playwright (verification) + frontend-design (gold-plating), never hydrate. Defining an MCP server adds per-turn TOKEN cost (schemas in context) but adds TURNS only if the model USES the tools (hydrate unused=0 turns; playwright used=+19).
hydrate_mcp_isolation_n3.caveat: NOT a hydrate isolation (playwright was stripped too). To truly isolate hydrate: keep playwright in BOTH arms, remove only hydrate. All 6 built ok; not rubric-scored.

a-tui-hydrate.rubric_note: owner-verified working in-run (King's Lynn 25°C partly cloudy, 4 metrics, 24 hourly, 7-day, C/F toggle 25C->77F, Tokyo search); not independently re-scored.
a-tui-hydrate.note: NOT REPRESENTATIVE, NOT a Hydrate isolation. TUI, normal config (Hydrate ON). Cost dominated by (a) frontend-design skill load -> atmospheric gold-plating, (b) Playwright verification loop, (c) an environmental stale-http.server port collision it had to debug (kill PID + re-serve). The clean-vs-normal config toggles the WHOLE plugin suite (frontend-design, playwright, ...) not just Hydrate; Hydrate's own measured injection was ~1.3KB. Do NOT attribute the $0.72->$1.67 delta to Hydrate.
a-tui-hydrate.hydrate: ON (normal config) — but confounded with frontend-design + playwright + env noise

v5h-headless-plain.rubric_note: scored 12/12 from source + live Playwright (London fallback 28°C/Overcast, wind+humidity, hourly, 7-DAY x7, 21 SVG icons, search, C/F toggle, no key; only console error = favicon 404). Heavier app, populates a beat slower than v4h.
v5h-headless-plain.note: HEADLESS re-run of v5: plain prompt, NO YAGNI, Hydrate hooks+MCP ON (normal config). Same harness/model/prompt as arm A except Hydrate ON -> isolates Hydrate cost on a cold one-shot. Hooks wrote CLAUDE.md + HYDRATE-wiki into the dir (proof hooks fired).

v4h-headless-yagni.rubric_note: scored 12/12 from source + live Playwright (24°/Overcast, wind+humidity, 7 daily rows, emoji icons, search, C/F toggle, no key). Criterion 12 passes via fluid layout (viewport+flex-wrap+max-width+100% widths), not @media.
v4h-headless-yagni.note: HEADLESS re-run of v4: plain prompt + YAGNI directive, Hydrate hooks+MCP ON (normal config). Same harness/model/Hydrate-state as v5h except the YAGNI directive -> isolates YAGNI with Hydrate held ON.

c-hydrate-yagni-on.note: design author chose single-file; audit gate wedged (audit_verifier_unavailable) → hand-merged; ~$9 driver dominated by 13.5M cache-read poll-loop overhead

c-hydrate-yagni-on-v2.note: second independent full-orch run; richer 134-line design → 841 LOC; audit wedge reproduced (audit_verifier_unavailable → manual audit + ff-merge); driver 9.4M cache-read poll overhead

c-develop-only-v3.note: DEVELOP-ONLY (no design phase); codex review/judge worked but AUDIT wedged on a NEW cause = codex audit pins gpt-5-codex, unsupported on a ChatGPT-auth account (400); plus verify.mjs test harness (453 LOC) built alongside

v4-singleshot-opus-yagni.driver: opus + manual YAGNI prompt, no orchestration
v4-singleshot-opus-yagni.note: single Opus shot with the orchestration YAGNI block prepended; chose single-file; curl-verified the APIs and removed a dead reverse-geocode call per YAGNI

v6-hydrate-yagni-skill.driver: owner, interactive TUI, via the shipped /hydrate-yagni skill
v6-hydrate-yagni-skill.rubric_note: scored 12/12 from source + live Playwright (Kings Lynn geolocation 21°C/Clear sky, wind 11 km/h, humidity 75%, 12 hourly entries with WMO emoji icons, 7-DAY x7 with hi/lo + icons, °C->°F toggle 21->70 converts all temps, Tokyo search -> live geocoding dropdown -> loaded Tokyo/Overcast; only console error = favicon 404, same as A/B/v5h).
v6-hydrate-yagni-skill.note: FIRST run of the SHIPPED /hydrate-yagni skill (every prior YAGNI arm — v4, v4h, ponytail — used a hand-pasted directive or plugin, never the user-invokable skill). Single self-contained weather.html, no build step. YAGNI fired behaviourally, not just on cost: the model removed its own dead reverse-geocode call mid-run ('Open-Meteo geocoding only supports name search, not lat/lon — would silently fail') and listed what it declined to build. Lowest LOC of the entire bench (217). Lands in the YAGNI cluster ($0.34-0.44); ~$0.09 above the $0.34 headless floor because this is an interactive TUI full-env run (skill-load + MCP present), matching v4's $0.44 — same prompt-half-only caveat (the skill is the lean PROMPT, not the stripped environment).
v6-hydrate-yagni-skill.hydrate: hooks+MCP ON (normal config, TUI), via /hydrate-yagni skill
